attempts.summary: Ran the sec_analytics lateral movement detector over the specified window and validated the source host context via an ad-hoc OpenSearch query. The tool already excludes backup/CI-CD windows.

answer.evidence: Unusual fan-out: 68 unique internal destinations not typical for this host during 2026-04-13 to 2026-04-20 (backup/CI/CD excluded), totaling 498,578 bytes out.
